subject: Chasme Demon
fact: Two Chasme Demons appear in the cavern.
source_quote: Two Chasme Demons appear

subject: Chasme Demon
fact: The party identifies the creatures as Chasme Demons through Arcana checks.
source_quote: identified by the party through Arcana checks

subject: Daein
fact: Daein recognizes the Chasme Demons' properties including magic resistance and immunity to poison.
source_quote: Daein recognizes the Chasme Demons' properties, including magic resistance, resistance to fire, cold, and lightning, advantage on saving throws against magic, immunity to poison, and their droning sound causing necrotic damage

subject: Chasme Demons
fact: Chasme Demons are intelligent taskmasters and interrogators from the Abyss who serve to punish deserters from the Blood War.
source_quote: Chasme Demons are intelligent taskmasters and interrogators from the Abyss who serve to punish deserters from the Blood War

subject: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead
fact: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on one demon.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Toll the Dead on one demon

subject: Bramgrim casts Spiritual Weapon
fact: Bramgrim casts Spiritual Weapon near another demon.
source_quote: Spiritual Weapon near another

subject: Daein
fact: Daein shouts for the drow prisoner.
source_quote: shouts for the drow prisoner

subject: Felkur casts Firebolt
fact: Felkur casts Firebolt, dealing fire damage to a demon which is halved due to resistance.
source_quote: Felkur casts Firebolt, dealing fire damage to a demon, which is halved due to its resistance

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear prepares an attack.
source_quote: The Owlbear prepares an attack

subject: Akritas casts Hunter's Mark
fact: Akritas attacks a Chasme Demon with her bow and casts Hunter's Mark.
source_quote: Akritas attacks a Chasme Demon with her bow and casts Hunter's Mark

subject: Owlbear attacks Chasme Demon
fact: The Owlbear attacks a Chasme Demon with its claws, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: the Owlbear attacks it with its claws, dealing significant damage

subject: Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim
fact: A Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim but misses.
source_quote: A Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim but misses

subject: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, damaging a Chasme Demon and halving its speed.
source_quote: Bramgrim casts Spirit Guardians, damaging a Chasme Demon and halving its speed

subject: Spiritual Weapon breaks chain
fact: Bramgrim uses his Spiritual Weapon to break the chain holding a prisoner's cage.
source_quote: Bramgrim uses his Spiritual Weapon to break the chain holding a prisoner's cage

subject: Xaven Tanor'this
fact: Xaven Tanor'this is a prisoner held in a cage by a chain.
source_quote: The Owlbear grabs the chain and prepares to lower the prisoner, Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Daein attacks with longsword
fact: Daein attacks a Chasme Demon with his longsword, dealing damage and using Action Surge for additional attacks.
source_quote: Daein attacks a Chasme Demon with his longsword, dealing damage and using Action Surge for additional attacks

subject: Felkur casts Firebolt again
fact: Felkur continues to attack with Firebolt.
source_quote: Felkur continues to attack with Firebolt

subject: Akritas attacks with bow
fact: Akritas moves back and attacks with her bow, dealing significant damage.
source_quote: Akritas moves back and attacks with her bow, dealing significant damage

subject: Chasme Demon defeated
fact: One Chasme Demon is defeated and dissolves.
source_quote: One Chasme Demon is defeated and dissolves

subject: Chasme Demon taunts Bramgrim
fact: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim.
source_quote: The remaining Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Bramgrim, saying 'So much iron on the outside, but soft jelly on the inside. I will find the crack in your shell, little stone man.'

subject: Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim again
fact: The Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim but misses.
source_quote: The Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim but misses

subject: Chasme Demon taunts Akritas
fact: The other Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Akritas.
source_quote: The other Chasme Demon telepathically taunts Akritas, saying 'I have played the minds of demons who define terror. You are merely a snack, and I will snack on you.'

subject: Chasme Demon attacks Akritas
fact: The Chasme Demon attempts to attack Akritas but misses due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability.
source_quote: The Chasme Demon attempts to attack Akritas but misses due to disadvantage from Daein's sap ability

subject: Bramgrim retreats
fact: Bramgrim disengages and moves toward the stairs.
source_quote: Bramgrim disengages and moves toward the stairs

subject: Owlbear lowers Xaven
fact: The Owlbear lowers Xaven Tanor'this to safety.
source_quote: The Owlbear lowers Xaven Tanor'this to safety

subject: Daein retreats
fact: Daein begins to retreat.
source_quote: Daein begins to retreat

subject: Chasme Demon critical hit
fact: The Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim with a critical hit, dealing 45 points of damage.
source_quote: The Chasme Demon attacks Bramgrim with a critical hit, dealing 45 points of damage (23 piercing and 22 necrotic)

subject: Party retreats
fact: The entire party retreats up the stairs with Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The entire party retreats up the stairs with Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Chasme Demon taunts retreating party
fact: The Chasme Demon taunts the retreating party.
source_quote: The Chasme Demon taunts the retreating party, saying 'I suppose Maram il Vass will have to get a new partner to guard these prisoners. Tick, tick, tick, tick, tick.'

subject: hags
fact: Three hags arrive to take over guarding the prisoners.
source_quote: Three hags arrive to take over guarding the prisoners

subject: Party escapes
fact: The party successfully escapes back to Maram il Vass's office.
source_quote: The party successfully escapes back to Maram il Vass's office

subject: Maram il Vass's office
fact: The party reappears in Maram il Vass's office with Xaven Tanor'this.
source_quote: The party reappears in Maram il Vass's office with Xaven Tanor'this

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass observes the party's injuries and inquires about the encounter with the demons.
source_quote: Maram il Vass observes the party's injuries and inquires about the encounter with the demons

subject: Party informs Maram
fact: The party informs Maram il Vass that one demon was killed.
source_quote: The party informs Maram il Vass that one demon was killed

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass reveals his long-standing interest in Felkur stemming from a stolen item.
source_quote: Maram il Vass reveals his long-standing interest in Felkur, stemming from a stolen item

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass explains he has a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur.
source_quote: Maram il Vass explains he has a deal with a devil who seeks Felkur

subject: Deal proposal
fact: Maram il Vass proposes a deal to Felkur to retrieve a specific magical item in exchange for not revealing Felkur's location.
source_quote: Maram il Vass proposes a deal to Felkur: retrieve a specific magical item for him, which he owes to another demon, in exchange for not revealing Felkur's location

subject: Felkur negotiation
fact: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass.
source_quote: Felkur, with Daein's bardic inspiration, engages in a complex negotiation with Maram il Vass to secure favorable terms for the contract

subject: Location clause added
fact: Felkur successfully adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve.
source_quote: Felkur successfully adds a clause to know the location and defenses of the magical item he must retrieve

subject: No-betrayal clause secured
fact: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse.
source_quote: Felkur secures a 'no-betrayal' clause, making the contract airtight against Maram il Vass switching sides or suffering a cosmic curse

subject: Binding ritual suggested
fact: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal.
source_quote: Felkur suggests a magical binding ritual to seal the deal

subject: Contract finalized
fact: The contract is finalized, granting Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms.
source_quote: The contract is finalized, granting Felkur a bonus on saving throws against fear while under its terms

subject: Maram il Vass
fact: Maram il Vass expresses his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills.
source_quote: Maram il Vass expresses his admiration for Felkur's negotiation skills
